prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a wooden dining table with an assortment of food items on it. There are several pieces of bread placed around the table, along with some toast that appears to be burnt or charred. In addition to the bread, there is a bowl containing soup, which adds variety to the meal.

The table also has utensils such as knives and spoons laid out neatly. Two wine glasses can be seen at opposite ends of the table, suggesting that this might be a dinner party or gathering where guests will enjoy both food and drinks.
